message:
feat(tests): add comprehensive blocking pool regression tests

Add 36+ regression tests for blocking pool shutdown and thread management:

Pool creation tests (5):
- test_pool_new_min_max, test_pool_new_zero_min, test_pool_new_min_equals_max
- test_pool_new_invalid_config, test_pool_default_options

Shutdown tests (7):
- test_shutdown_and_wait_empty_pool, test_shutdown_and_wait_pending_tasks
- test_shutdown_and_wait_timeout_respected, test_shutdown_and_wait_returns_false_on_timeout
- test_shutdown_idempotent, test_shutdown_wakes_parked_workers, test_shutdown_tasks_complete

Thread spawning tests (7):
- test_spawn_from_pool, test_spawn_from_handle, test_spawn_handle_clone_independence
- test_spawn_scales_to_max, test_spawn_respects_min, test_spawn_under_load

Counter/Queue/Parking tests (9):
- test_active_threads_starts_at_min, test_active_threads_accuracy, test_active_threads_on_panic
- test_queue_fifo, test_queue_length, test_queue_empty_on_shutdown
- test_worker_parks_on_empty, test_worker_wakes_on_task, test_worker_min_never_exits

Task/Thread/Handle tests (5):
- test_task_panic_caught, test_task_cancellation
- test_thread_names, test_handle_outlives_pool

Stress tests (4, marked #[ignore]):
- stress_test_blocking_pool_churn, stress_test_blocking_pool_shutdown_race
- stress_test_blocking_pool_counter_accuracy, stress_test_blocking_pool_panic_recovery

Resolves: bd-1jp7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
